---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

<div style="text-align: center; padding: 3rem 0;">

# Jacky Man

## Data. Strategy. Execution.

<img src="https://media.licdn.com/dms/image/v2/C4D03AQHg6NYHz-YDPA/profile-displayphoto-shrink_400_400/profile-displayphoto-shrink_400_400/0/1610337915831?e=1776902400&v=beta&t=UaOCXjbgoQIT0fBATRg8rgJ62IFSj-RBI0aJYkuqRUY"
     width="160"
     style="border-radius: 50%; margin: 20px 0;" />

</div>

---

## What I Focus On

::: {.columns}

::: {.column}
### Analytics  
Using data to understand performance, uncover trends, and identify opportunities.
:::

::: {.column}
### Strategy  
Turning insights into practical recommendations that support growth and better decision making.
:::

::: {.column}
### Execution  
Focusing on clear actions that move the needle, not just interesting analysis.
:::

:::

---

## Beyond Work

Outside of my professional work, I’m also a points and miles hobbyist and a hands on home DIYer.

I enjoy finding smart ways to maximize travel rewards, optimize loyalty programs, and turn everyday spending into better experiences. I take a similar approach at home, where I like figuring out how things work, improving spaces, and taking on projects that blend problem solving with creativity.

---

## Explore

- [About](about.qmd)
- [Projects](Projects.qmd)
- [CV](CV.qmd)
- [Contact](Contact.qmd)
